task_description: Implement phone-free mode for Phase 42 FEAT-006: mode controller with biometric auth, emergency access (always available), UI state management, and session logging.

verification.summary: Typecheck clean, 163/163 tests pass (27 new phone-free tests), semantic review APPROVED at v2. All v1 issues fixed. 506 LOC source+tests (marginally over 500 due to safety fixes mandated by review).
